features: 24/7 Active Fresh Autospray effortlessly tackles odours with aerosol free fragrance
Lush aroma of cherry blossom and juicy raspberries with notes of violet leaf, whipped sugar and warm woods to bring a touch of sophistication
Infused with 2x more essential oils* (*vs existing Air Wick Active Fresh Autospray Refills)
Tackles odours with amazing fragrance for up to 70 days* (*based on lowest setting)
description: Product Description Air Wick 24/7 Active Fresh Autospray is our first and best ever* aerosol free autospray that tackles odours effortlessly for up to 70 days** (*vs Freshmatic; **based on lowest setting). Air Freshener. Airwick. Ingredients Contains: ALCOHOL
